phases.title: Cradle feature implementation prompt hardening
phases.intent: Add exact-path pre-author orphan-file detection to applyImplementationTask without changing unrelated contribution workflow behavior.
acceptanceFocus: Implementation task instructions require checking planned new files before writing.
Existing files under collision-prone paths must be read and reported to the orchestrator.
The agent must wait for scope direction instead of auto-resolving the collision.

phases.title: Cradle harness integration prompt hardening
phases.intent: Add the same detection behavior before harness integration creates planned new harness files.
acceptanceFocus: Harness integration creation guidance checks exact planned paths before authoring.
The check remains limited to planned new files and common collision-prone paths.

phases.title: CC10X TDD GREEN guidance hardening
phases.intent: Ensure implementation-oriented TDD guidance checks planned new paths before writing implementation code.
acceptanceFocus: GREEN phase guidance still enforces minimal implementation and exit-code evidence.
Pre-author orphan-file checks are performed before Write/Edit creates planned new files.

phases.title: SDK babysit/process template guidance hardening
phases.intent: Extend SDK instruction templates so future generated implementation-style processes inherit the pre-author orphan-file check without weakening existing REUSE-AUDIT guidance.
acceptanceFocus: Plan-scoped REUSE-AUDIT remains intact and distinct from implementation-time orphan checks.
Generated implementation process guidance preserves exact-path collision detection.
Coding philosophy continues to prefer existing files over unnecessary new files.

knownIssueContext.title: feature: Pre-flight orphan-file grep in impl-task prompts
knownIssueContext.problem: Recent cookbook work discovered multiple already-existing proposed artifacts only after authoring started, wasting time and forcing scope pivots.
knownIssueContext.requestedBehavior: Before an implementation agent writes a new file under common-author paths, it should check the exact proposed path, read existing content if present, report findings, and wait for orchestrator direction.
explicitNonGoals: Do not broaden the preflight into a mandatory check for every ordinary edit.
Do not create implementation source changes as part of this planning artifact.
